description_long: This is an adult woman wearing a fitted long-sleeve blouse tucked into high-waisted trousers, paired with formal shoes. She is wearing a hijab that covers her hair and neck, and glasses with a rectangular frame. Her posture is upright, with arms relaxed and slightly extended at her sides. The blouse has a subtle gradient, and the trousers are tailored, giving a professional and polished appearance. The shoes are closed-toe and have a slight heel, suitable for business or urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and her overall look is neat and businesslike.
description: A professionally dressed adult woman in a blouse, trousers, hijab, and glasses, standing upright with a polished, businesslike appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blouse, hijab, glasses, and formal trousers with both arms visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hijab, glasses, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hijab, blouse, and trousers, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the hijab, glasses, and the tailored fit of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: business blouse, tailored trousers, hijab, formal glasses
